title.en: Ye Tian nodded and agreed to exchange.

content.en:
"10,000 Battle Merit, One High-Quality Purple Ruins Devouring Stone!"

"Good!"

Ye Tian nodded and agreed to exchange.

There are only six high-quality Purple Ruins Devouring Stones, which is indeed a small number, but this is a good start!

Soon, six high-quality Purple Ruin Devouring Stones were exchanged.

"Hey, these six Purple Ruin Devouring Stones are better than the high-quality Purple Ruin Devouring Stones I obtained before, but they are smaller. Ye Tian muttered.

Subsequently.

He went back to refine the Purple Ruins Devouring Stone and comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules.

His other replica body continued to patrol the area around the Winter Night Fortress, looking for traces of the Supreme Void Demon.

In the following years, Ye Tian continued to look for the Supreme Dao Void Demons, killing one by one the Supreme Dao Void Demons, each time the harvest was different, many times he could only kill a few Supreme Dao Void Demons, but after a long time, the battle exploits obtained would naturally increase.

This kind of harvest is not much different from finding the Purple Ruin Devouring Stone Treasure Land and collecting the Purple Ruin Devouring Stone.

Before you know it, hundreds of solstice eras have passed.

At this time, Ye Tian had already exchanged a lot of Purple Ruins Devouring Stones, but he didn't have time to refine them.

And his frequent exchange behavior naturally attracted the attention of the higher-ups of the Winter Night Fortress.

However, the top management of the Winter Night Fortress didn't care about this matter, even if Ye Tian really self-destructed his future comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, it was Ye Tian's business, and it had nothing to do with them.

What they cared about was Ye Tian's combat power, which could play a good role in the next tribulation, so they paid attention to Ye Tian.

......

"The Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule has been raised to the eighty percent realm!"

Ye Tian was excited.

Originally, I thought that it would take an incomparably long time to raise the sixth sequence to eighty percent of the Dao rules, but now through the exchange of the Purple Ruins Devouring Stone, the sixth sequence to the realm of the Dao rules has improved very quickly.

According to this trend, there would be no problem in raising the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rule to the Ten Percent Realm before the calamity came.

this day.

Ye Tian carried the patrol mirror to find the Supreme Dao Void Demon, and found several Supreme Dao Void Demons, and then directly killed them.

Just as he was about to leave, the void around him suddenly changed.

"Not good!"

He knew that he was being targeted by an incomparably powerful Supreme Void Demon.

Rumble!!!

A very wonderful female Dao Void Demon descended, but that face was too inconsistent with Ye Tian's aesthetics.

Through the exploration of the Copying Talent, he recognized the identity of this Supreme Void Demon.

Eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon - Blood Yao!

This is one of the top ten existences among the Heavenly Blood Eightfold Dao Void Demons, and her reputation is extremely loud, and the Winter Night Fortress also has information about her.

Not only did Blood Yao cultivate to the eightfold Supreme Dao Void Demon, but she also comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao rules to the realm of more than ninety percent, and her bloodline had reached the heaven level, second only to the supreme bloodline.

What this meant, Ye Tian knew very well, that is, her combat power of the same level was second only to the powerhouse of the strongest Dao bloodline, and she was able to fight against the weaker Nine Noble Dao Realm.

"Mole ants, it's you who hunt our blood-blooded people, die!"

As soon as the words fell, Ye Tian's duplicate body was directly annihilated.

......

"The Blood Yao Supreme Dao Void Demon is really terrifying, it seems that I hunted too many Supreme Dao Void Demons to attract the attention of this Blood Yao Supreme Dao Void Demon, or did I kill her descendants?" Ye Tian guessed.

But whatever the possibility, this hunting has to change!

"Gotta do it another way!"

Ye Tian was going to copy a fivefold Supreme Dao Void Demon body, and then sneak into the area of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, secretly looking for an opportunity to kill more Supreme Dao Void Demons, and then bring back the corpse of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, which could still be exchanged for a large number of battle merits.

It's just that the combat power of the Supreme Dao Void Demon Replicating Body is not strong, and relying on the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, it is at most comparable to the combat power of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon, which is far inferior to the strength of the True Body Replicating Body.

But for now, he can only rely on this way, he doesn't want to continue to attract Xueyao's attention, otherwise she keeps staring at him, and he will have to die once he goes out.

Of course.

If Xue Yao really wanted to investigate, his Supreme Dao Void Demon Replica Body would not be able to hide it.

However, the Void Domain is so big that even the entire Infinite Domain is inconspicuous in the Void Domain, and such a huge Void Domain, even if the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon uses the Nine Patterns to Dao Weapon, it can't probe too far away.

Therefore, as long as he stayed away from the area where Blood Yao was located, there would be no major problem.

"Let's get a patrol mirror first!"

Ye Tian went to make up for it, and it was done quickly.

Then, he left the Winter Night Fortress, and in a place not too far away, he condensed a Fivefold Supreme Dao Void Demon, allowing this Fivefold Supreme Dao Void Demon to leave quickly.

......

In the void.

Ye Tian's Supreme Dao Void Demon Replica Body was constantly shuttling, and it was already extremely far away from the Winter Night Fortress, and it was also relatively far away from the area where Blood Yao was located.

I don't know how long it took to shuttle, but I finally came to an area of the Supreme Void Demon.

The area is divided into countless pieces, each of which is equivalent to a small space, and the whole area appears to be an incomparably large invisible fortress.

Ye Tian had read the information of the Supreme Dao Void Demon and knew that this was a tribe of the Supreme Dao Void Demon, each tribe was composed of countless small fortresses, divided into many spatial areas.

Like the Heavenly Blood Bloodline, there are hundreds of thousands of tribes, one can imagine how many clansmen there are, and the Heavenly Blood Tribe is only a tribe that is relatively powerful to the Dao Void Demon, and there are more than ten tribes that are more powerful than the Heavenly Blood Tribe.

Soon.

Ye Tian came to this Supreme Dao Void Demon Tribe, he was not hindered, and the Supreme Dao Void Demon here didn't matter what his identity was, as long as he settled here, he was the Supreme Dao Void Demon of this tribe, but he had to obey the management of the master of this tribe.

After coming here, Ye Tian saw the strongest person of this tribe - the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demon Qihe!

Ye Tian probed and found that this Supreme Dao Void Demon had a total of six Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons, and his strength was not strong.

Moreover, these six Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons were all weak.

"Can kill!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

If you slaughter this group of Supreme Dao Void Demons, you can exchange it for a lot of battle merits, but it is not easy to escape.

You must fight quickly, and let one of the clones be cannon fodder, sacrificing yourself to escape for the others.

this day.

Ye Tian has condensed six copy bodies, all of them are Supreme Dao Void Demons, he doesn't dare to condense the true body to copy his body here, that is looking for death, and it will definitely alarm the Dao Void Demon big man.

After the six replica bodies were condensed, he directly attacked and killed the six Sevenfold Supreme Dao Void Demons of this tribe.
